description_long: This is a retro-styled green microwave oven with a rectangular body and rounded edges, featuring a large, oval-shaped black window on the front door. The door is equipped with a vertical silver handle on the right side, and to the right of the handle is a circular digital display showing '00:00' above three round control buttons. The microwave's exterior is a smooth, gradient green color, with the front panel containing all interactive elements. The top, sides, and back are plain and unadorned, with no visible vents or additional features. A small, metallic brand logo is present below the window, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise minimalist design.
description: A green, retro-style microwave with a large oval window, silver handle, and a digital control panel on the front. The sides and back are plain, with a small brand logo below the window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval black window, silver vertical handle, digital display, three round buttons, and a small brand logo below the window.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth green surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain green surface with no visible vents, panels, or markings.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain green surface and no distinguishing features.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, metallic brand logo is present below the window on the front door, centered and rectangular in shape, with stylized text.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, featuring a circular digital display at the top and three round buttons arranged vertically below it. The display is labeled with '00:00' and the buttons are evenly spaced, with no additional dials or touchpads visible.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertically oriented, silver-colored bar attached to the right edge of the door. It is cylindrical, extends the majority of the door's height, and is slightly offset from the door surface for easy gripping.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any surface of the microwave.
attribute_window_presence: A large, oval-shaped black window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's central area.
